title: Digit Sum
description:
⏱ Time: 5 mins
Part A: Sum digits of number.
Part B: Square the result.
part_a_prompt: # PART A: Write a function 'sum_digits' that takes a positive integer and returns the sum of its digits.
part_b_prompt: # PART B: Use your partner's 'sum_digits' to implement 'process_number(n)'. It should return the square of the sum of digits of n.
